subject: [COMMON] Chore: Add dependabot config
commit_message:
[COMMON] Chore: Add dependabot config

Adding Dependabot configuration for automatic patching of github
actions. This configuration can be extended to cover application
code if the project desires.

Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Change-Id: If68946ae57c86d253cce361a1c252c4af0bb16ea
Signed-off-by: Kevin Sandi <ksandi@contractor.linuxfoundation.org>
